key_observations: Executive Properties has 74 open leasing and property management job postings, which signals aggressive growth and likely strain on existing staff. Lead with the staffing relief angle, specifically how EliseAI covers the communication workload so current team members are not overwhelmed while new hires ramp up.

The Akron market shows strong income growth at 10.6% year over year despite slight population decline, meaning renters are staying local and have more spending power. This is a good hook for framing EliseAI as a tool to capture a competitive, quality-focused renter base rather than a high-volume churn play.

No technology stack was detected for Executive Properties, which means Cindy is likely managing prospect and resident communication through manual processes or basic tools. Frame EliseAI as a straightforward upgrade that does not require replacing existing systems, and emphasize the speed-to-value story since there is no complex migration involved.
